# Product Custom Info

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module extends products to allow having custom properties on them.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Installation

- You depend from module `base_custom_info`, found in [OCA/server-tools](https://github.com/OCA/server-tools).

## Configuration

To create custom info templates, please review documentation from
`base_custom_info` module.

## Usage

To use this module you need to:

1. Go to product form -> Custom information tab.
2. Create or select Custom Information Template.
3. Attributes from selected template will appear on the form. You can now set desired values.
4. Once you set attributes at the Product form you will se these attributes at the related Variants.
5. You can add extra Variant attributes in addition to attributes that comes from Product same way.

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/product-attribute/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us smashing it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/product-attribute/issues/new?body=module:%20product_custom_info%0Aversion:%2014.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with technical issues.
